title: Magic Tricks Show Set with Top Hat, Rabbit Trick, Magic Wand and Guide Book, Ages 6+
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes magician's top hat, rabbit trick prop, magic wand, playing cards, rings, cups, and comprehensive guide book for an authentic magic show experience
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 6 years and up, featuring simple and easy-to-follow instructions for each magical trick
CLASSIC TRICKS: Master famous illusions including the rabbit-from-hat trick, linking rings, cup and ball tricks, and card magic using the included props
LEARNING VALUE: Helps develop performance skills, hand-eye coordination, and confidence while entertaining friends and family with magical performances
KIT CONTENTS: Features over 25 professional magic props including plastic top hat, magic wand, trick cards, coloured rings, cups, and detailed instruction booklet
description: Product Description Transform into a master magician with this comprehensive Magic Tricks Show set! Perfect for aspiring performers aged 6 and up, this kit includes everything needed to put on an amazing magic show. The centrepiece is a classic black top hat and the famous rabbit trick, complemented by an authentic magic wand for that extra theatrical flair. The set comes packed with various props including linking rings, cups, dice, playing cards, and multiple mysterious accessories to perform countless illusions. A detailed guide book provides simple, easy-to-follow instructions for mastering each trick. Whether performing for family gatherings or friendly audiences, this magic set helps develop confidence, presentation skills, and hand-eye coordination while providing hours of entertainment. The durable plastic hat and quality components ensure long-lasting fun as young magicians perfect their craft. Start your journey into the wonderful world of magic and amaze your audience with spectacular tricks and illusions! Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Chocking hazard - small parts

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Develop fine motor skills, coordination and cognitive skills through practice and repetition of tricks as well as understanding basic magic principles and deceptions.
